comment.body:
Cumulative treasury buyback 2025 (first image) 
schedule into august https://home.treasury.gov/system/files/221/Tentative-Buyback-Schedule.pdf
Second image - cumulative buyback going back to 2023.

Treasury is pulling supply on the front end which then compresses yields. 2023 had 0 events, and 2024 had 1.
Main takeaways
- Treasury became more active with repurchases going into May and into June
- Huge treasury issuance expires end of June and the treasury projects 850B by end of June (current TGA is at like 400 and the RRP is at like 300B)
Likely will see huge auctions over the next 2 weeks which will spike yields temporarily. Cash will rotate from the RRP into the TGA and empty it and then a mild hit to equities (slightly pullback).  Treasury will likely try to spread out the debt across the yield curve and smooth it out. Problem now is with this issuance do investors want that kind of duration risk with inflation rising. Thats why all the macro stuff form earlier in the year needed to be resolved by now.

comment.body:
Good morning all. For anyone who is new to Alma's substack, the limitations of Substack leads to a lot of confusion. My 2 cents on how to approach using Alma's Substack is below.... pro tip is to BOOKMARK the links in your browser. Also, know that due to Alma being away from her desk the past handful of days, she has not been active on any of the chats. She typically is engaged on the chats when she is free from her other duties.

** Review each Weekly Post every Monday (https://stochvoltrader.substack.com/s/market-analysis?utm_source=substack&utm_medium=menu)
** Review each Daily Post at beginning of the day (same link as above)

** Have two windows open for Chats everyday:
---- New Daily Chat set up each day 
---- Trading Signals Chat (Alma provides trading signals occasionally as a courtesy - don't expect signals all the time! Alma has limited her signals lately but we hope she shares more soon because they have a very high win rate. This chat was set up on February 3 soon after Alma opened up the Substack; link is https://substack.com/chat/2679129/post/5ec8d5aa-9fac-4e6d-aef1-3f6a28632ae4)

** Educate yourselves with these chats and posts by reading through them, maybe even more than once:
---- Ongoing Q&A Chat (set up on February 26; https://substack.com/chat/2679129/post/398075ab-2aac-41d1-bf37-8fda43ccf9aa) 
---- Options Depth Heat Map Overview (set up on February 5; https://substack.com/chat/2679129/post/2aab643b-d095-4c00-8b42-4f35379fb002)
---- Educational Posts (https://stochvoltrader.substack.com/s/educational-posts) 

Hope this helps!!!
